outlook.headline: AI/datacenter demand keeps broadening and remains supply-constrained
outlook.summary: The reads point to another step-up in AI/datacenter demand into 2026Q1: mention frequency rose from 22.5x/22.6x to 31.5x, or 20% above the trailing average. Demand is no longer just a hyperscaler story; it is broadening across frontier labs, enterprises, memory, equipment, test, and packaging, while tight supply and extended lead times at several names suggest the build remains under-served. Watch whether current hyperscaler pull-ins and capacity ramps stay orderly or start to normalize.

drivers.label: Hyperscaler and frontier-lab capex is still expanding
drivers.detail: Multiple reads describe ongoing AI factory build-outs and rising compute demand across hyperscalers, frontier labs, and enterprises, supporting near-term order momentum.

drivers.label: Supply remains tight in key AI/compute nodes
drivers.detail: Severe undersupply, tight supply, and extended lead times imply demand is still running ahead of available capacity, which should keep the sector in a favorable demand backdrop.

drivers.label: AI/datacenter memory demand is accelerating
drivers.detail: Datacenter bits are growing faster than PC/mobile and AI infrastructure is broadening memory demand, a positive read-through for memory and memory-adjacent exposure.

drivers.label: Broadening benefit across the value chain
drivers.detail: Equipment, process control, test, packaging, and power suppliers all describe stronger AI/datacenter pull, showing the demand cycle is widening beyond the GPU/wafer-fab core.

drivers.label: AI/data center is a durable growth vector for analog/mixed-signal
drivers.detail: Companies with exposure to data center power, mix improvement, and share gains are seeing AI reinforce end-demand rather than offset it.

risks: Hyperscaler pull-ins could turn into near-term digestion if capacity ramps overshoot.
Lead times and tight supply could ease faster than expected as foundry and equipment capacity comes online.
Demand breadth beyond hyperscalers/AI leaders needs to keep expanding; otherwise growth stays concentrated.
